picks.reasoning: STEP 0 — LINE ANOMALY CHECK: CLE at 1.83 vs ATL 2.00 — home team favoured, records consistent (50-29 vs 45-34), no anomaly. STEP 1 — NetRtg L15: CLE +6.1 vs ATL +30.1. ATL L15 is dramatically higher (30.1 gap favours ATL), but this is flagged in skills as a potential hot-streak situation. ATL L10 7-3 but overall record 45-34 (.570 W%). CLE L15 +6.1 is solid. ATL L15 +30.1 is an extreme outlier — regression risk applies (hot streak fade rule). STEP 2 — Schedule: no B2B concern identified for either team. STEP 3 — FRANCHISE PLAYER INJURY: Donovan Mitchell is QUESTIONABLE (right ankle sprain) — this is CLE's franchise player. Apply confidence -10, stake -20%. Dean Wade also questionable (role player). ATL: Jock Landale OUT (role player per skills), RayJ Dennis/Keshon Gilbert questionable (G-League two-ways, minimal impact). STEP 4 — SEEDING CONTEXT: CLE fighting for seeding (50-29, playoff locked), Atlanta (45-34) also in seeding race — both motivated. STEP 5 — HOME COURT: CLE at home worth ~2-3 pts / ~0.10-0.15 odds edge. STEP 6 — HOT STREAK FADE ANALYSIS: ATL L10 7-3 but season W% .570. L15 NetRtg +30.1 is an extreme deviation from their season NetRtg of +2.6 — this implies massive regression risk. CLE at home with +6.1 L15 shows genuine recent form. CLE season NetRtg +4.2 vs ATL +2.6 — CLE superior on both season and meaningful metrics. STEP 7 — Mitchell GTD impact: base confidence 72 (CLE home, superior NetRtg, ATL regression-due, home court) → -10 for Mitchell QTD = 62. Mitchell questionable means ~50% chance he plays; if OUT CLE ceiling drops but depth remains. EV = (0.62 × 1.83) - 1 = 1.1346 - 1 = 0.1346. EV = 0.135 → marginal/approaching strong edge. Above 0.05 threshold, proceed. STAKE: Confidence 62 = Medium tier (15-20% of bankroll). With Mitchell GTD penalty -20% on stake: base stake ~€268 (20%) × 0.80 = ~€201. ANCHOR: Darius Garland, Jarrett Allen (if Mitchell out, they carry load).

report: Difficult slate tonight — most games feature extreme ML pricing outside the 1.60–2.50 target range (DEN 1.02, DET 1.04, PHX 1.20, OKC 1.38), creating few actionable opportunities. Two picks drafted: CLE ML at 1.83 leveraging ATL hot-streak regression risk (L15 +30.1 vs season +2.6 divergence) with Mitchell GTD factored in; POR ML at 2.28 exploiting SAS dual franchise/key player Doubtful status (Wembanyama + Castle both Doubtful) combined with POR's strong L15/L10 form and play-in motivation. Injury feed source is NBA Official with 8-team coverage — normal confidence rules apply. Pace data: Pace values present in feed for tonight's teams; however O/U odds are N/A across all games, so no totals available. LA Clippers advanced stats unavailable, blocking any OKC/LAC spread analysis.
